name: 🖼️ 批量缩略图
description: 视频截图 → 网格拼图 → 统计报告
descriptionEn: Extract frames → Create montage grid → Summary report

steps.label: 获取视频时长
提取缩略图
steps.task:
# Step 2: Extract thumbnail frames at regular intervals
INPUT="input.mp4"
INTERVAL=30    # Seconds between screenshots
WIDTH=320      # Thumbnail width in pixels
OUTDIR="thumbs_${INPUT%.*}"

echo "⏳ Extracting thumbnails every ${INTERVAL}s..."
mkdir -p "$OUTDIR"
ffmpeg -i "$INPUT" -vf "fps=1/${INTERVAL},scale=${WIDTH}:-1" -q:v 3 "${OUTDIR}/thumb_%04d.jpg" -y 2>&1 | tail -5

echo ""
echo "📸 Generated thumbnails:"
ls -1 "${OUTDIR}"/*.jpg 2>/dev/null | wc -l | awk '{print $1 " images in '"'"$OUTDIR"'"'"}'

steps.label: 创建网格拼图
steps.task:
# Step 3: Create a montage collage from extracted thumbnails
INPUT="input.mp4"
OUTDIR="thumbs_${INPUT%.*}"
COLS=4  # Number of columns in the grid
MONTAGE="montage_${INPUT%.*}.jpg"

echo "===== Creating Montage ====="
echo ""

if command -v magick >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "🖼️ Using ImageMagick magick..."
  cd "$OUTDIR" && magick montage *.jpg -tile ${COLS}x -geometry '320x>+2+2' "../$MONTAGE" 2>&1
  cd ..
  echo "✅ Montage saved: $MONTAGE"
elif command -v convert >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "🖼️ Using ImageMagick convert..."
  cd "$OUTDIR" && convert *.jpg +append "../$MONTAGE" 2>&1
  cd ..
  echo "✅ Montage saved: $MONTAGE"
else
  echo "⚠ ImageMagick is not installed. Skipping montage creation."
  echo "  Install: brew install imagemagick  (macOS)"
  echo "  Or:     sudo apt install imagemagick (Linux)"
fi

echo ""
echo "===== Report ====="
echo "Source: $INPUT"
THUMB_COUNT=$(ls "${OUTDIR}"/*.jpg 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "Thumbnails: $THUMB_COUNT images"
if [ -f "$MONTAGE" ]; then
  MONTAGE_SIZE=$(ls -lh "$MONTAGE" | awk '{print $5}')
  echo "Montage size: $MONTAGE_SIZE"
fi
echo "Location: $(pwd)/${OUTDIR}/"
echo ""
echo "💡 Tip: Open the montage image or individual thumbnails by clicking their paths in the terminal output"
